name: Iso11783OPLock
title: Iso11783OPLock
syntax: long Iso11783OPLock( dword ecuHandle, dword lock, dword maskID, dword timeout );
description: The function locks the screen updates on the Virtual Terminal. A Lock command is sent to the Virtual Terminal.

parameters.name: ecuHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the ECU (must be created with Iso11783CreateECU)
